notes: Frankfurt-based joint venture of DFS Deutsche Flugsicherung (51%) and Deutsche Telekom (49%). Received Europe's first DJI Dock operating license in May 2023. Works with VGF on infrastructure inspection.

Leading DJI reseller in Germany with 14 locations in Germany and Austria. Provides complete packages with licensing and commissioning. Developed EasyDock software for local server operations. First to receive Germany's DJI Dock 2 BVLOS approval for customer viscan GmbH.
Official DJI Enterprise dealer in Germany. Located at Besigheimer Straße 20, 74394 Hessigheim. Supplies over 35,000 customers worldwide.
Certified by Federal Aviation Office (Luftfahrtbundesamt) since 2017. Designated testing center for remote pilots since 2021. Offers DJI Dock systems and training.
German-based distributor offering complete DJI Dock product line with pricing and product information.
Offers DJI Dock 2 and 3 with complete packages including operating licenses. Specializes in Solar Inspection Dock 3 packages.
Located in Hagen, Germany. Specializes in UAV surveying complete systems. Offers DJI Dock 2 and 3 for surveying and inspections.
Drone expert in Germany for hobby, authority BOS, and industry applications. Offers complete DJI Dock solutions with training and permits.
European DJI Academy training center in Bad Schönborn. Offers Dock Certificate training. Implementing one of Europe's largest DJI Dock projects for pipeline construction in northern Germany.
Official DJI Europa dealer in Northern Germany. Designated testing center of the LBA. Specializes in energy sector and automated drone systems.
German distributor of professional DJI drone equipment and accessories.
German-based retailer specializing in DJI products including DJI Dock systems for professional drone operations.
Specializes in DJI Dock systems for emergency services (firefighting, rescue, police). Provides firmware updates and initial training for BOS operations.
Certified DJI Dock Partner. Provides consulting, installation, and permits. Supports inspection, monitoring, and surveying applications including power line and solar inspection.
Largest DJI partner in Europe (founded 2012). Headquartered in Ubstadt-Weiher. Developed CyberXHub software platform. Managing one of Europe's largest DJI Dock projects for pipeline construction.
Holds special BVLOS operating permits for DJI Dock. First company in Germany to receive DJI Dock 2 BVLOS approval from LBA.
German construction company using DJI Dock 2 via Skyports for automated BVLOS surveying of Rheinbrücke Leverkusen bridge project. Deployed for weekly surveys until 2028.
Infrastructure company operating DJI Dock 2 at Rheinbrücke Leverkusen bridge in Germany for HOCHTIEF. Remote operations from Madrid. Processes data with DroneDeploy for 2D and 3D surveys.
Frankfurt public transport company partnering with Droniq for DJI drone operations including infrastructure inspection and 3D surveying of overhead contact lines.
Security and protection services company that tested DJI Dock 2 with U-ROB. Uses DJI Dock for automated patrol and alarm verification services for industrial facilities.
European energy utility with relevant case study on DJI Dock 2 deployment for energy management mentioned in German inspection context.
German drone information and news portal providing DJI Dock product information, reviews, and market updates for professionals.
German reseller offering DJI Dock systems with focus on professional applications.
